meta_title: For Students: freelance pitching to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: For Students: Freelance Pitching to Solve AI Overwhelm
content.seo_description: Overwhelmed by AI tools? Learn how to focus your efforts on freelance pitching using Antigravity and Claude Code to build your portfolio and land clients.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing every new AI tool. Instead, build a single, high-value freelance pitch engine. By automating your outreach and project scoping with Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform from a confused student into a professional consultant, solving real business problems while building a portfolio that actually converts into revenue.
content.intro:
The modern student landscape is a minefield of 'shiny object syndrome.' You wake up to ten new AI frameworks, five wrapper updates, and a constant, nagging feeling that you're falling behind. The noise isn't just distracting—it's paralyzing. You are drowning in potential, yet lacking a clear path to your first real-world deployment.

But here is the secret the gurus won't tell you: the technology matters less than the application. By shifting your focus from 'learning tools' to 'freelance pitching,' you force yourself to solve actual business constraints. We are going to bypass the tutorial hell and use Antigravity and Claude Code to build a professional pitch automation system that turns your technical skills into a career-defining asset.

steps.title: Define Your Value Proposition
steps.description: Before writing code, identify one specific business problem you can solve for local companies using AI automation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a senior consultant. Create a list of 5 high-impact AI automation services for local businesses that require minimal backend infrastructure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'generate a project plan for a lead-generation bot based on the selected service'

steps.title: Build the Pitch Generator
steps.description: Create a script that takes a company's website URL and generates a personalized, AI-driven audit and pitch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Python script that scrapes a business landing page and drafts a 3-paragraph email pitch highlighting a specific automation opportunity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --edit 'add error handling for the web scraper and improve the pitch tone to be professional yet persuasive'

steps.title: Automate Outreach Logic
steps.description: Implement a pipeline that organizes your prospects and tracks pitch performance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a schema for a CSV-based CRM that tracks business names, contact emails, pitch status, and follow-up dates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'create a python function to update the CRM CSV file based on new lead data'

steps.title: Deploy the Client Portal
steps.description: Create a simple landing page where clients can view your portfolio and book discovery calls.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, responsive HTML/Tailwind landing page template for an AI automation consultant that includes a contact form.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --edit 'add form validation and integrate a mailto trigger for the contact button'

steps.title: Final Integration and Refinement
steps.description: Connect your pitch generator to your portal to create a seamless workflow for your new freelance business.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the entire project structure to be modular, ensuring the pitch generator and CRM functions are cleanly separated.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'run tests on the integrated workflow to ensure the pitch generator correctly outputs data to the CRM'

pro_tips: Never pitch the AI tool itself; always pitch the time or money you will save the business owner.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write; it makes your repo look professional for potential clients.
Limit your initial outreach to 10 companies to refine your pitch before scaling to larger lists.
Always include a 'no-code' version of your solution so clients feel comfortable that they aren't tied to complex infrastructure.
Store your best pitch templates as reusable assets in your Antigravity workspace to speed up future outreach.
content.next_steps: After completing this project, reach out to your first 5 leads, gather feedback on your pitch, and iterate on your messaging based on their responses.
content.conversion_block: You now have a system that moves you from a student to a professional consultant. Don't let this code sit in a folder—deploy it, pitch it, and start earning. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
